design_philosophy: Friendly, engaging, and energetic. The UI should evoke a sense of playfulness and optimism suitable for an education marketplace. We use soft geometry (rounded corners), high-contrast playful accents, and a clear, functional layout that doesn't feel overly corporate.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to let content breathe.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Dashboard should use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Keep it dense but visually separated.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl for major cards, rounded-full for buttons. Soft, friendly geometry.

surface_styles.card_default: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden
surface_styles.card_interactive: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-200 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(226,232,240,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(203,213,225,1)] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
surface_styles.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200
surface_styles.primary_button: bg-sky-500 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-sky-600 hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none transition-all shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(14,165,233,0.39)]
surface_styles.secondary_button: bg-amber-400 text-slate-900 font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-amber-500 hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 transition-all shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(245,158,11,0.39)]
surface_styles.destructive_button: bg-red-500 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-red-600 transition-all
surface_styles.input_field: bg-slate-50 border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-sky-500/20 focus:border-sky-500 transition-all

students.usage: Student dashboard hero or profile placeholder

teachers.usage: Teacher dashboard hero or profile placeholder
Teacher profile image or class banner

video_placeholder.usage: Background or placeholder for the video call screen

component_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Override Shadcn default border-radius to 1.5rem (rounded-3xl) for cards and modals. Change primary color to Sky Blue (sky-500).
component_instructions.cards: Do not use standard subtle borders. Use 'card_interactive' surface style for clickable classes. It provides a tactile, engaging feel.
component_instructions.badges: Use highly rounded (rounded-full) badges with vibrant background colors (amber-100 text-amber-800, sky-100 text-sky-800) for class subjects or statuses.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Standardize size to 20px or 24px. Keep stroke-width at 2 or 2.5 for a bolder, friendlier appearance.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, forms) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case representing their role. Example: `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='book-class-button'`.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text is only used on primary/destructive buttons. Dark navy text must be used on warning/yellow buttons for APCA contrast compliance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup tailwind.config.js to include Fredoka and Nunito font families.
2. Apply the HSL variables in index.css mapped to the colors provided here.
3. Build the Dashboard using the Bento grid layout style. It should not look like a sterile Vercel app; inject the primary and secondary colors generously in headers, icons, and buttons.
4. For Authentication, create a split layout: left side with a vibrant gradient (sky-400 to violet-500) and an illustration/image of a student, right side clean login form with rounded-2xl inputs.
5. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels media URLs exactly as specified for class thumbnails and profile placeholders. DO NOT use generic placeholder services.
6. Ensure the Video Integration placeholder is a massive, immersive UI area taking up 80vh, with a floating 'Leave Class' destructive button and controls floating over the image using glassmorphism.
7. All buttons and interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` properties.
8. Ensure React components are created as .js or .jsx files, not .tsx.
